page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-8x.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at 3.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration, the instance integrates eight NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps. However, the instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached storage options.

This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring parallel processing power and high network throughput. It is suitable for deep learning, large-scale GPU-based simulations, and parallel compute tasks. The dedicated CPU allocation and high GPU density offer resource efficiency for compute-heavy workloads, though the lack of local storage requires consideration of network storage latency.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-8x.32xlarge is a KVM-based, GPU-accelerated server designed for parallel processing and compute-intensive workloads. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by 3.3 GHz Intel Xeon 6462C processors on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 1024.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by eight NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM. The instance operates with a 100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth but lacks local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions. This configuration is optimized for deep learning, parallel computing, and GPU-driven simulations where dedicated CPU resources and high-density GPU acceleration are required.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute platform featuring eight NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs and high-speed network connectivity for parallel processing workloads.
